no: Total Monk class conversion — disables vanilla Monk/Sun Soul/Dark Moon and recreates them as Thief kits. Fundamentally incompatible with ALL other monk-modifying mods (cdtweaks, M&G, ToF, Refinements, AK). v0.4 beta.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: MO disables vanilla Monk class. cdtweaks monk components target vanilla Monk which no longer exists.
conflicts.theirComps: #2560 Allow Monks to Wear Helmets #6150 Circle Kick for Monks

conflicts.reason: MO replaces fist system with custom QDMFIST item. M&G modifies vanilla fist tables which MO monks never use.
MO blocks staves via custom item restriction spell. ToF patches vanilla Monk class restrictions which MO monks (Thief kits) bypass.
MO monks use Thief HLAs, not Monk HLAs. Refinements monk HLA changes affect only disabled vanilla Monk.
AK monk kits assume vanilla Monk class. MO disables vanilla Monk entirely, breaking AK monk kits.
conflicts.theirComps: #10001 Monk Revisions #10002 Brawler #10003 Sacred Fist #10004 Ninja

passive.desc: Reimplemented as thief-base. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS mod to AC, unarmed 1d6/2 APR/+5 magical.

activated.effects: Flurry of Blows (+1/+2 APR), Ki Strike (+1-5 hit/dmg), Stunning Blows (25% stun).
Stillness (immune charm/fear), Purity (immune poison/disease), Lightning Reflexes (immune backstab, Evasion), Deflect Missiles (+4 AC vs ranged).

restrictions.items: No helmets/shields/2H melee. Thief skills limited to Find Traps/Hide/Move Silently. No backstab.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: As Monk but Purifying Strike (double dmg vs Evil), Unbroken Soul (+2 AC vs evil, immune level drain).

activated.effects: Purifying Strike replaces Ki Strike. Unbroken Soul replaces Lightning Reflexes.

restrictions.items: No stealth. No dual to Mage.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: As Monk but Hands of Shadow (25% blind), Dark Mirror (mirror images on hit).

activated.effects: Hands of Shadow replaces Stunning Blows. Dark Mirror replaces Deflect Missiles.

restrictions.items: Detect Illusions instead of Detect Traps. Dual to Mage only.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: Multiclass Fighter + Monk. May Specialize in 1H/ranged weapons.

hlaPool.note: Multi-class with monk abilities; inherits fighter HLAs

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class kit: cleric/mage spellcasting if applicable; monk features retained.

passive.desc: Precise Strike (crit range expansion). Gets Pick Pockets + Remove Traps via Thievery.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: Nullifying Blows (25% dispel on hit). Deflect Magic (absorb 1st targeted spell/round).

restrictions.items: No stealth. Dual to Mage only.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: Assassin's Strike (+1-5 hit and backstab multiplier).

restrictions.items: No Detect Traps. Dual to Fighter only.

hlaPool.note: Custom monk HLAs with fighting/defensive style picks

statBonus.note: Thief-base internally. Fighter THAC0, d8 HD, WIS to AC.

passive.desc: Unbreakable Resolve (absorb 1st attack/round). d10 HD (warrior HP).

restrictions.items: No stealth. Dual to Fighter or Cleric.

new: Multiclass monk combining fighter THAC0 and weapon access with monk abilities.
Multiclass monk combining divine spellcasting with monk martial arts.
Multiclass monk combining arcane spellcasting with monk martial arts.
Multiclass Sun Soul monk with fighter combat training and radiant abilities.
Halfling monks seeing body and mind as gifts from Yondalla. Defensive focus.
Ancient order devoted to Azuth. Combines martial arts with arcane understanding.
Monks searching for secrets of life through studying death. Dark contemplation.
Order devoted to Ilmater. Endures suffering to heal others through compassion.
Multiclass Hin Fist monk with fighter combat training.
Multiclass Shining Hand monk with arcane spellcasting.
Multiclass Long Death monk with fighter combat training.
Multiclass Broken One monk with divine healing magic.
Multiclass Broken One monk with fighter combat training.

Multiclass Broken One monk with arcane spellcasting.
Multiclass Shining Hand monk with divine spellcasting.

sum: Adds 5 new monk kits based on different monastic traditions. Each order has unique abilities and fighting styles.

co.no: Disables vanilla Monk in clsrcreq.2da. Creates 3 Thief-based monk kits with custom fists, fighting styles, and item restrictions. Patches Rasaad.
Opens racial availability for revised monk kits. Requires Core.
Creates 8 multiclass monk combinations as Thief kits (Fighter/Monk, Cleric/Monk, etc.). Requires Core.
Adds 4 new monk kits (Hin Fist, Shining Hand, Long Death, Broken One) as Thief kits. Requires Core.
Rebuilds item restriction spell. Install LAST after all item mods. Requires Core.

advisories.reason: SCS AI expects vanilla Monk class for enemy monks. MO monks as Thief kits may confuse SCS creature scripts.
